overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game showing a character walking through a foggy, neon-lit urban environment at night. The character navigates covered walkways, crosses an LED-illuminated crosswalk with other pedestrians, and continues along a busy sidewalk beneath elevated highways with futuristic vehicles passing by.

large teal structural pillar supporting the overhead walkway

green and red illuminated sign for automotive service

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered urban promenade with teal support pillars on the right and neon advertisements glowing on the left. The yellow tactile paving guides the path toward a distant intersection where vehicles pass by. The atmosphere is foggy with artificial neon lighting dominating the scene.

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a futuristic crosswalk with LED surface markings displaying red WAIT text. The signal changes to green WALK with pedestrian symbols, and the character crosses with a group of pedestrians. The intersection is open to the foggy night sky with vehicles visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an orange-tiled sidewalk next to a busy street with futuristic vehicles passing by. The environment becomes increasingly enclosed as the path goes beneath elevated highway structures and industrial pipes. A pedestrian with a glowing umbrella walks ahead, and neon signs including one for WASTED LIQUORS illuminate the foggy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a foggy, neon-lit cyberpunk city that shifts from a sheltered promenade to an open intersection and finally into a dense industrial underpass. It begins along a covered urban walkway, guided by yellow tactile paving between teal pillars and glowing advertisements. As the path reaches a distant intersection, the camera pauses at a futuristic crosswalk where red LED wait signals transition to green walk symbols, allowing the character to cross the street amidst a group of pedestrians under the open night sky. The scene then shifts toward an orange-tiled sidewalk as the environment becomes increasingly enclosed, moving beneath massive elevated highway structures and industrial pipes. Finally, the camera follows a pedestrian with a glowing umbrella past neon signs for Wasted Liquors, disappearing deeper into the foggy, urban haze.
